prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game key art, square splash illustration
Primary request: dark-fantasy evolution art for the Vavarda clicker at level 10, title Herald of the Heart
Scene/background: grand ruined sanctum with a storm-lit ritual heart or core of power in the distance, fractured architecture, high contrast atmosphere
Subject: central herald mage, fully evolved early-game form, elegant but dangerous, ornate dark armor with a radiant violet chest crystal, commanding a dense sphere of arcane energy
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy game illustration, polished hero milestone art, strong readability and premium finish
Composition/framing: centered full figure, square crop, iconic silhouette, milestone-worthy but still below endgame scale
Lighting/mood: triumphant, dangerous, ceremonial, a clear capstone of the first progression arc
Color palette: black, rich amethyst, silver, intense violet light, subtle magenta highlights
Materials/textures: engraved armor, rune crystal, sacred smoke, broken sanctum stone
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, one character only, make it feel like the peak of the first ten levels
